summary: Release evidence reconciliation follow-up captured after status namespace, provenance, and tmp hygiene improvements.

observations.problem: Direct script execution from the repo root failed because the script imports the local tests package without ensuring the repo root is on sys.path.
observations.why_it_matters: Frozen schema sample refresh is part of report-contract maintenance; requiring PYTHONPATH=. makes the recovery step easier to miss during release evidence refreshes.
observations.automation_candidate: Add the same direct-script import fallback pattern used by ops scripts, or document and wrap the command in a Makefile target.
observations.suggested_followup: Automated on 2026-05-05: tools/regenerate_report_schema_samples.py now bootstraps the repo root for direct script execution, and tests/test_report_schema_sample_regeneration.py covers the direct --help path without PYTHONPATH.
